pattern: For each digit position independently, count the frequency of each digit value; pairs that differ contribute n - freq[d] to the total, giving an O(n * D) column-wise solution.
hints: Each digit position is independent. Focus on a single column first: how many pairs disagree at that column?
At each column, if a digit value d appears freq[d] times out of n numbers, then each of the freq[d] numbers disagrees with the remaining n - freq[d] numbers.
Sum over all columns: for each column tally digit frequencies, then for each digit d add freq[d] * (n - freq[d]). Divide by 2 to avoid double-counting pairs.

edge_inputs.description: all identical numbers, sum is zero
two numbers differing in every digit
three numbers of the given example
two elements with all same digits
two elements differing in all places
numbers with leading structures where only one column differs
mix where some columns fully agree and some fully disagree

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, size)
    nums = [rng.randint(1000, 9999) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
